rows.before_excerpt:
TASK : 
 recruiting fitness gate. For each candidate, decide if worth spending full RAP grade on. 
 
 # # Calibration read before deciding 
 
 COARSE FILTER, not competitor with RAP grader. recruiter sourced candidates intentionally. job to skip ONLY candidates, irreconcilably wrong not to second - guess every imperfect fit. 
 
 * * Default to " go ". * find debating candidate, evidence merit real grade. Hand question to RAP grader ; do not pre - empt here. 
 
 * * Skip only on hard disqualifier
